articles.title: Two New Cuphead Games Are On The Way, And One’s An 8-Bit Platform Shooter
articles.summary: Two new Cuphead games are in development from Studio MDHR, the studio behind the original Cuphead. The first game is a hand-animated Cuphead title that has not been officially announced or released yet, but it's expected to be another Cuphead game like its predecessor. The second game, Mighty Cuphead Adventure, is an 8-bit platform shooter developed with 80s technology and designed in classic Assembly Language. It will feature familiar-looking bosses and characters from the original Cuphead, as well as some nods to the games of the era.
